product_overview: Aplicação single-page para registrar e calcular tempo gasto em tarefas, com apoio a timer e entrada manual, organização por projetos e relatórios por período.
core_goals: Permitir criação rápida de tarefas com tempo via timer ou entrada manual
Manter histórico completo de tarefas com filtros por período e por projeto
Gerir projetos (criar, renomear, soft-delete) e refletir mudanças no histórico
Apresentar resumo de horas e contagem de tarefas por período

features.name: Task list, filters, and report summary
features.description: Exibir lista de tarefas recentes, permitir filtrar por intervalo de datas e projeto, e mostrar cartões de resumo de horas e contagem de tarefas.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click 'Tarefas' in sidebar -> See recent tasks list rendered -> Set 'De' date filter to a start date -> Set 'Ate' date filter to an end date -> Select project filter 'Todos' or a specific project -> See tasks list update to match filters -> See 'Horas totais' and 'Tarefas no periodo' cards update to reflect filtered results -> Click 'Limpar filtros' -> See date and project filters reset and full list restored

Navigate to / -> Click 'Tarefas' in sidebar -> Locate task row to delete -> Click 'Excluir' on task row -> Confirm deletion in modal -> See task removed from list -> See 'Horas totais' and 'Tarefas no periodo' cards update

Navigate to / -> Click 'Tarefas' in sidebar -> Set 'De' date filter to a date after 'Ate' -> Set 'Ate' date filter to an earlier date -> See validation error or user-facing message about invalid date range -> Filters not applied

features.name: Create manual task
features.description: Criar uma tarefa finalizada informando nome, projeto opcional e duração manual (horas e minutos).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click '+' to open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> Fill 'Nome da tarefa' with 'Correção de bug' -> Select project 'Cliente A' (optional) -> Select 'Manual' mode -> Fill 'Horas' with 2 -> Fill 'Minutos' with 30 -> Click 'Salvar tarefa' -> See modal close -> See new task appear in tasks list with status 'Finalizada' and duration '02:30' -> See 'Horas totais' update

Navigate to / -> Click '+' to open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> Leave 'Nome da tarefa' empty -> Select 'Manual' mode -> Fill 'Horas' with 1 -> Click 'Salvar tarefa' -> See validation error indicating name is required -> Task is not created

Navigate to / -> Click '+' to open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> Fill 'Nome da tarefa' with 'Teste' -> Select 'Manual' mode -> Leave 'Horas' 0 and 'Minutos' 0 -> Click 'Salvar tarefa' -> See validation error indicating duration must be greater than zero -> Task is not created

features.name: Create timer task (start, pause, resume, finalize)
features.description: Registrar tempo usando um timer única tarefa ativa por vez, com suporte a pausar, retomar e finalizar, persistindo a duração resultante.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click '+' to open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> Fill 'Nome da tarefa' with 'Reunião de alinhamento' -> Select project 'Sem projeto' or specific project -> Select 'Timer' mode -> Click 'Iniciar' -> Wait a few seconds -> Click 'Pausar' -> Click 'Retomar' -> Wait a few seconds -> Click 'Finalizar' -> See task persisted in list with non-zero duration and status 'Finalizada' -> See 'Horas totais' update

Navigate to / -> Click '+' to open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> Fill 'Nome da tarefa' with 'Tarefa A' -> Select 'Timer' mode -> Click 'Iniciar' -> Keep Task A running -> Open 'Nova tarefa' modal for Task B -> Fill 'Nome da tarefa' with 'Tarefa B' -> Select 'Timer' mode -> Click 'Iniciar' -> See app prevents multiple timers from running (start disabled or error shown) -> Task B is not started
Navigate to / -> Click '+' to open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> Leave 'Nome da tarefa' empty -> Select 'Timer' mode -> Click 'Iniciar' -> See validation error blocking timer start -> Timer not started

features.name: Project management (create, rename, remove)
features.description: CRUD para projetos com validações (nome obrigatório, sem duplicidade), remoção como soft-delete e impacto apropriado na seleção de projetos ao criar tarefas.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click 'Projetos' in sidebar -> Click 'Novo projeto' -> Fill project name with 'Cliente A' -> Click 'Adicionar projeto' -> See project listed in projects view -> Open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> See 'Cliente A' available in project selection

Navigate to / -> Click 'Projetos' in sidebar -> Locate project 'Cliente A' -> Click 'Renomear' on that project -> Fill new name 'Cliente A - V2' -> Click 'Salvar' -> See project name updated in list -> Open tasks list -> See tasks associated reflect updated project name

Navigate to / -> Click 'Projetos' in sidebar -> Locate project 'Cliente A' -> Click 'Remover' on that project -> Confirm removal in modal -> See project marked as deleted in projects list -> Open 'Nova tarefa' modal -> See deleted project not present in project selection -> Existing tasks keep their original project association

Navigate to / -> Click 'Projetos' in sidebar -> Click 'Novo projeto' -> Fill project name with an existing name 'Cliente A' (case-insensitive) -> Click 'Adicionar projeto' -> See validation error about duplicate name -> Project not created
Navigate to / -> Click 'Projetos' in sidebar -> Click 'Novo projeto' -> Leave name empty -> Click 'Adicionar projeto' -> See validation error indicating name is required -> Project not created

routes.description: Single-page app with sidebar navigation between "Tarefas" and "Projetos" (no URL routing).

features.name: Task list, filters, and report summary
features.description: View recent tasks, filter by date range and project, and see report summary cards.
user_interactions: View tasks list and per-task duration
Set "De" and "Ate" date filters
Filter by "Todos", "Sem projeto", or a specific project
Click "Limpar filtros" to reset filters
See "Horas totais" and "Tarefas no periodo" cards update with filters
Delete a task via "Excluir" and confirm in modal

features.name: Create manual task
features.description: Create a finished task by manually entering hours and minutes.
user_interactions: Click "+" to open "Nova tarefa" modal
Fill "Nome da tarefa"
Optionally select a project (or keep "Sem projeto")
Select "Manual" mode and enter "Horas" and/or "Minutos"
Click "Salvar tarefa" and see the task added to the list
Validation blocks save when name is empty or duration is zero

features.name: Create timer task (start, pause, resume, finalize)
features.description: Track time using a single active timer, with pause/resume and finalize.
user_interactions: Click "+" to open "Nova tarefa" modal
Fill "Nome da tarefa" and select "Timer" mode
Click "Iniciar", wait a few seconds, then click "Pausar"
Click "Retomar" to resume
Click "Finalizar" to finish and persist a non-zero duration
App prevents multiple timers from running at the same time

features.name: Project management (create, rename, remove)
features.description: Manage projects used to categorize tasks; removed projects are soft-deleted.
user_interactions: Click "Projetos" in sidebar
Create a project via "Novo projeto" and "Adicionar projeto"
Rename a project via "Renomear" modal and save
Remove a project via "Remover" and confirm (soft-delete)
Removed projects are not selectable when creating new tasks
Validation blocks empty names and duplicate names (case-insensitive, trimmed)

known_limitations.issue: No URL-based routing; navigation is internal state only.
known_limitations.impact: Cannot deep-link directly to "Tarefas" vs "Projetos" via URL.

known_limitations.issue: Data persistence is browser localStorage only (no backend).
known_limitations.impact: Data is device/browser-specific and not shared across users.
